calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantaprich/M. Vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, Man Yin Cheung present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Connie Man Yin Cheung.
Decree signed in open court.
